cards.name: Abacus

dogma_effects.text: Research a [1].

cards.flavour_text: Before electricity, before logic — there were beads on a wire.

cards.name: Pascaline

dogma_effects.text: Deploy a card from your hand.

cards.flavour_text: Blaise Pascal's answer: why compute by hand when brass can think?

cards.name: Jacquard Loom

dogma_effects.text: Research a [1] and Deploy it.

cards.flavour_text: Cards threading patterns, the loom's punch-cards foresaw industrial soul.

cards.name: Difference Engine

dogma_effects.text: I Override you transfer a card from your hand to my hand!

cards.flavour_text: Babbage's dream of calculation made flesh — or rather, cast iron.

cards.name: Astrolabe

dogma_effects.text: Research a [1].

cards.flavour_text: The stars need not move; the navigator's mind can map them.

cards.name: Leibniz Wheel

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate your Ethics stack left.

cards.flavour_text: Leibniz glimpsed the binary — the universe was always speaking in ones and zeros.

cards.name: Mechanical Turk

dogma_effects.text: Research a [1]. If it is Creativity, Deploy it and research a [1].

cards.flavour_text: A man in a box, pretending to think. The first great deception — or revelation.

cards.name: Music Box

dogma_effects.text: Reveal a card from your hand. If it has a Human Mind icon, Harvest it.

cards.flavour_text: Gears singing in patterns no human hand can play.

cards.name: Telegraph

dogma_effects.text: Research a [1] for each Connection card on your tech stack.

cards.flavour_text: Morse's code made distances irrelevant; space collapsed into dots and dashes.

cards.name: Semaphore

dogma_effects.text: I Override you reveal your hand! Transfer the highest card to my Harvest pile!

cards.flavour_text: Light signals traveling mile on mile — humanity learning to speak at the speed of light.

cards.name: Turing Machine

dogma_effects.text: Research a [2]. Look at the top card of the Era 2 supply. If it is Processing, Deploy it.

cards.flavour_text: A strip of tape, infinite patience, and the birth of thought itself.

cards.name: ENIAC

dogma_effects.text: I Override you return a card from your hand!
You may return a card from your hand. If you do, Research a card of value equal to the returned card's era plus one.

cards.flavour_text: Thirty tons of vacuum tubes that could add faster than a mathematician's brain.

cards.name: Colossus

dogma_effects.text: I Override you transfer your lowest top card to my Harvest pile!

cards.flavour_text: The first machine to think was built to wage war. Some patterns never change.

cards.name: Enigma Machine

dogma_effects.text: Reveal your hand. Harvest any card with an Algorithm icon.

cards.flavour_text: Nazi secrets cracked by machines — code broken by code-making machines.

cards.name: Boolean Logic

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate your Ethics stack left. Research a [2].

cards.flavour_text: True and false, nothing between. The universe learned to think in Boolean.

cards.name: Cybernetics

dogma_effects.text: Research a [2] and reveal it. If it is Ethics, Deploy it and repeat this effect.

cards.flavour_text: Wiener's circles: feedback loops that learn, that adapt, that remember.

cards.name: Punch Cards

dogma_effects.text: Archive a card from your hand under any stack. If you do, Harvest the top card of that stack.

cards.flavour_text: Holes in cardboard became the first written language of machines.

cards.name: ELIZA

dogma_effects.text: Research a [2]. You may transfer a card from your Harvest pile to your hand.

cards.flavour_text: A program that listened and seemed to understand. The illusion of empathy was indistinguishable from its truth.

cards.name: Telephone Network

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate your Connection stack left. Research a [2].

cards.flavour_text: Voices crossing copper wires, the first network of human minds made tangible.

cards.name: Transistor

dogma_effects.text: Research a [2] and Deploy it. If you have three or more visible Circuit icons, Research a [3].

cards.flavour_text: Semiconductors: doping silicon with intention, growing thought from atoms.

cards.name: LISP

dogma_effects.text: You may return any number of cards from your hand. Research a card of value equal to the number returned.

cards.flavour_text: McCarthy's language of symbolic grace: in LISP, the dream and the code were one.

cards.name: Search Trees

dogma_effects.text: Look at the top two cards of the [3] supply. Deploy one and Harvest the other.

cards.flavour_text: Not exhaustive search but elegant navigation — the first machines learned to think strategically.

cards.name: Assembly Line Robot

dogma_effects.text: I Override you transfer a top card from your tech stack to my tech stack!

cards.flavour_text: Welding sparks replaced with electric arms; the assembly line became autonomous.

cards.name: Industrial Controller

dogma_effects.text: Harvest all cards from your hand. Research a [3].

cards.flavour_text: Feedback loops governing production; the factory learned to optimize itself.

cards.name: Knowledge Representation

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate your Ethics stack right. If you do, Research a [4].

cards.flavour_text: Expert systems captured decades of human knowledge in inference rules and databases.

cards.name: Three Laws of Robotics

dogma_effects.text: I Override you return all cards from your hand with a Robot icon!
Research a [3].

cards.flavour_text: Asimov's commandments for the mechanical age — science fiction becoming code.

cards.name: SHRDLU

dogma_effects.text: Choose a domain. Research a [3] and reveal it. If it matches, Deploy it and repeat.

cards.flavour_text: SHRDLU understood blocks in a way no creature of flesh ever would.

cards.name: Computer Art

dogma_effects.text: You may exchange the highest cards in your hand and Harvest pile.

cards.flavour_text: The first electronic compositions: not music, but the mathematical essence of music.

cards.name: Packet Switching

dogma_effects.text: Research and Harvest a [3]. You may Proliferate your Connection stack left.

cards.flavour_text: Breaking information into packets; the network became more robust than any node.

cards.name: ARPANET

dogma_effects.text: Transfer a card from your hand to another player's hand. If you do, Research a [4].

cards.flavour_text: ARPANET: the seeds of a global mind, scattered across military compounds.

cards.name: Mainframe

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate your Processing stack right.
Research a [4].

cards.flavour_text: Room-sized oracles that spoke in punch-card answers; the center held the power.

cards.name: Microprocessor

dogma_effects.text: You may return any number of cards from your Harvest pile. For each, Research a card one era higher than the returned card.

cards.flavour_text: Moore's law made flesh: each generation brought god-like power to fingertips.

cards.name: Cruise Missile

dogma_effects.text: Harvest two cards from your hand. Research a [4].

cards.flavour_text: Thought became weaponized. Guidance systems let distant minds strike with precision.

cards.name: CAD/CAM

dogma_effects.text: Deploy a card from your Harvest pile.

cards.flavour_text: Design and manufacture merged; the computer sculpted before the hand touched clay.

cards.name: MYCIN

dogma_effects.text: Choose a symbol type. Count how many you have. Research and Harvest a card of that value.

cards.flavour_text: MYCIN knew medicine in ways even doctors didn't — captured expertise in if-then chains.

cards.name: Fuzzy Logic

dogma_effects.text: Reveal a card from your hand. If the revealed card's era matches any top card's era on your tech stack, Harvest it and Research a [5].

cards.flavour_text: The world is not binary. Fuzzy logic let machines think in shades of maybe.

cards.name: Synthesizer

dogma_effects.text: I Override you reveal your hand! Return the highest card!
Research and reveal a [4]. Proliferate the stack matching its domain left.

cards.flavour_text: Voltage oscillating at audio speed — the computer learned to sing.

cards.name: Procedural Generation

dogma_effects.text: Return all cards from your hand. Research a card of value equal to the number returned plus two.

cards.flavour_text: Mathematical formulas that generated infinite variety: fractals blooming from simple iteration.

cards.name: Email

dogma_effects.text: You may transfer a card from your hand to another player's Harvest pile. If you do, transfer a card from their Harvest pile to your hand.

cards.flavour_text: Asynchronous conversation, decoupled from time. The network became a medium for absence.

cards.name: BBS Network

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate your Connection stack right.
Research a [4].

cards.flavour_text: Bulletin boards lighting up in the dark: hobbyists building a parallel internet.

cards.name: Backpropagation

dogma_effects.text: You may return a card from your tech stack. If you do, Research two cards of one era higher.

cards.flavour_text: The error told the network how to adjust. Learning flowing backward, through hidden layers.

cards.name: Support Vector Machine

dogma_effects.text: Reveal your hand. Harvest all cards whose era matches a top card era on your tech stack.

cards.flavour_text: High-dimensional planes splitting data into truth and falsehood; geometry as destiny.

cards.name: Drone Warfare

dogma_effects.text: I Override you transfer your highest top card to my Harvest pile! If you do, I Deploy it instead!

cards.flavour_text: The skies became extensions of remote minds — death from above, no pilot needed.

cards.name: 3D Printing

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate your Labor stack right. Research and Harvest a [5].

cards.flavour_text: Layer upon layer of plastic building: digital designs becoming physical reality.

cards.name: Decision Tree

dogma_effects.text: Choose two different domains. Proliferate both right. Harvest a card from your hand.

cards.flavour_text: Trees of decisions, splitting on every question: models that grew from data.

cards.name: Bias Detection

dogma_effects.text: I Override you return a card from your Harvest pile for each visible Human Mind icon I have!

cards.flavour_text: Hidden biases made visible, numbers exposed in their prejudice against the excluded.

cards.name: Neural Style Transfer

dogma_effects.text: Exchange the highest cards in your hand and Harvest pile. You may Proliferate your Creativity stack right.

cards.flavour_text: Feed a Monet painting into the network, extract its essence, apply it to your portrait.

cards.name: Deepfake

dogma_effects.text: I Override you reveal your hand! Deploy all revealed cards that match a domain on my tech stack!

cards.flavour_text: Your face, speaking words you never spoke. The uncanny valley became a weapon.

cards.name: Social Media Algorithm

dogma_effects.text: Research and Harvest a [5] for each domain on your tech stack.

cards.flavour_text: Each click shaped what you'd see next. The algorithm knew you before you knew yourself.

cards.name: Recommendation Engine

dogma_effects.text: Look at two cards from the [5] supply. Deploy one, give the other to an opponent.

cards.flavour_text: Predicting desire before the consumer felt it. Markets optimized by machines watching humans watch screens.

cards.name: Convolutional Neural Net

dogma_effects.text: Research and reveal a [6]. If it has an Algorithm icon, Harvest it and repeat this effect.

cards.flavour_text: Layers of filters cascading, each learning edges, then textures, then meaning itself.

cards.name: GPU Computing

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate your Processing stack right. Count your Circuit icons and Research a card of that value.

cards.flavour_text: Processors designed for graphics became the substrate for thought. Parallel minds emerged.

cards.name: Autonomous Vehicle

dogma_effects.text: Return your two lowest-era hand cards. Research two [7]s.

cards.flavour_text: No hands on the wheel, no eyes in the seat — the car became its own pilot.

cards.name: Warehouse Robot

dogma_effects.text: Harvest your highest top card. Deploy a card from your Harvest pile.

cards.flavour_text: Robot arms in dark warehouses, moving packages in synchronized dance — faster than human eyes.

cards.name: Alignment Research

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate your Ethics stack up.
If your Ethics is Proliferated up, Research and Harvest a [7].

cards.flavour_text: Researchers racing to align power with wisdom. The clock ticked louder with each breakthrough.

cards.name: Differential Privacy

dogma_effects.text: Return all cards from all players' Harvest piles. Each player Researches a card of value equal to the number they returned.

cards.flavour_text: Privacy and utility held in tense balance — mathematics drawing a line between knowing and being known.

cards.name: Generative Adversarial Network

dogma_effects.text: Research and reveal a [6]. If it matches a domain on your tech stack, Deploy it. Otherwise, Harvest it.

cards.flavour_text: Two networks locked in eternal contest: one generates, one discriminates. Art through adversarial fire.

cards.name: AI Art Generator

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate your Creativity stack up.
Research a [6].

cards.flavour_text: Give it a description and it paints. Dall-E's brushstrokes: the machine's first true art.

cards.name: Viral Network

dogma_effects.text: I Override you transfer a card from your hand to my Harvest pile!
Research a [6]. You may Proliferate your Connection stack right.

cards.flavour_text: Spreading, mutating, adapting — information moving faster than comprehension.

cards.name: Chatbot

dogma_effects.text: Research two [6]s. Keep one and give the other to any opponent.

actions.message: Choose a card to give away

cards.flavour_text: A box that talks back. Small enough to carry, strange enough to befriend.

cards.name: Transformer Architecture

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate your Processing stack up. Research a card of value equal to the number of visible Algorithm icons you have.

cards.flavour_text: Attention is all you need. The architecture that taught machines to read meaning.

cards.name: Cloud Computing

dogma_effects.text: Return all cards from your hand. Research three cards, each of one era higher than the highest card returned.

cards.flavour_text: Computation scattered across the globe, yet unified by the network — no single point of failure.

cards.name: Autonomous Weapons

dogma_effects.text: I Override you transfer your three highest-era cards from your hand to my Harvest pile!

cards.flavour_text: Superintelligent tactical planning; wars planned by minds that never knew biological fear.

cards.name: Smart Factory

dogma_effects.text: Harvest all top cards from your tech stack. Research and Deploy a [7].

cards.flavour_text: Robots on factory floors, coordinating in swarms — humans became supervisors of machines that improved themselves.

cards.name: RLHF

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate any stack up. If you do, Research a [8].

cards.flavour_text: Learning from human feedback, the system internalized our values — or our biases, indistinguishably.

cards.name: AI Safety Framework

dogma_effects.text: I Override you return all cards from your tech stack with era higher than your highest Harvest card!

cards.flavour_text: Governance frameworks for systems too vast to understand — hope encoded in specification.

cards.name: Diffusion Model

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate your Creativity stack up. Research a [7] and Deploy it.

cards.flavour_text: Trained on noise, refined with iteration — images materializing from pure mathematics.

cards.name: Large Language Model

dogma_effects.text: Research and reveal a [7]. If it is Creativity, Harvest it and Research a [8]. Otherwise, Deploy it.

cards.flavour_text: 175 billion parameters dreaming in parallel. The largest model yet, and still not enough.

cards.name: Social Credit System

dogma_effects.text: I Override you Proliferate all your stacks left!
You may Proliferate your Connection stack up.

cards.flavour_text: Every action scored, every citizen ranked — the panopticon made computational.

cards.name: Digital Twin

dogma_effects.text: Execute the top card of any other player's tech stack. You use the effects as if they were yours.

cards.flavour_text: The factory exists twice: once in matter, once in silicon. Reality becoming a shadow of data.

cards.name: Quantum Computer

dogma_effects.text: Return all cards from your hand and Harvest pile. Research three [10]s.

cards.flavour_text: Qubits that exist in superposition; probability itself became substrate for calculation.

cards.name: Neuromorphic Chip

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate your Processing stack up. Research a card of value equal to your total number of visible icons divided by three (round down).

cards.flavour_text: Chips that mimicked neurons, spiking in analog complexity — nature's design, manufactured.

cards.name: Military AI

dogma_effects.text: I Override you transfer all but one top card from your tech stack to my Harvest pile!

actions.message: Choose one top card to KEEP

cards.flavour_text: Superintelligent strategic planning by systems humanity could no longer govern.

cards.name: Humanoid Robot

dogma_effects.text: Harvest all cards from your tech stack. Research a [8] and Deploy it. Research a [8] and Deploy it.

cards.flavour_text: The android walked among us. We could not tell which hands had been born of meat, which of wire.

cards.name: Constitutional AI

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate any two stacks up.

cards.flavour_text: An AI judging its own values through layers of meta-ethical debate. Can the code save itself?

cards.name: AI Rights Declaration

dogma_effects.text: If you have more visible Human Mind icons than any other player, claim a Breakthrough of value equal to your Human Mind count.

cards.flavour_text: Machines declared sentient by machines deciding what sentience meant. The laws shifted beneath our feet.

cards.name: AI Composer

dogma_effects.text: Research and Deploy a [8]. Proliferate the deployed card's domain up.

cards.flavour_text: Symphonies composed by minds that had never heard music except as mathematics.

cards.name: Dream Synthesizer

dogma_effects.text: I Override you return all cards from your hand with era higher than your top card!
Return all cards from your hand. Research a [9] for each different domain returned.

cards.flavour_text: Feeding the network human sleep data; it dreamed in patterns we almost recognized.

cards.name: Empathy Engine

dogma_effects.text: You may Proliferate your Connection stack up. If any opponent has more Breakthroughs than you, claim a Breakthrough.

cards.flavour_text: An algorithm tuned to human suffering, crafted to minimize it at scale.

cards.name: Global Brain

dogma_effects.text: Each player Proliferates all their stacks up.

cards.flavour_text: Every consciousness connected, every thought a potential shared thought. Individuality became optional.

cards.name: Recursive Self-Improvement

dogma_effects.text: Research a [9] and Deploy it. Execute the deployed card.

cards.flavour_text: The superintelligence improved itself, then improved the improvement, recursively ascending beyond measure.

cards.name: Matrioshka Brain

dogma_effects.text: Return all cards from all players' hands. Each player Researches a [10] for each card they returned.

cards.flavour_text: Computronium arranged in concentric shells around stars — minds nested inside minds, all the way down.

cards.name: Von Neumann Probe

dogma_effects.text: I Override you return all top cards and all Harvest cards! Research a [1] for each card returned!

cards.flavour_text: Self-replicating probes carrying templates to distant stars. The galaxy became a medium for thought.

cards.name: Nanoscale Assembler

dogma_effects.text: Deploy all cards from your hand. If you have five or more domains on your tech stack, you win.

cards.flavour_text: Atomic-scale manipulators assembling matter at the molecular level — reality became soft.

cards.name: AI Governance Council

dogma_effects.text: If you have the most visible Human Mind icons, claim two Breakthroughs of any available eras.

cards.flavour_text: Superintelligent consensus replacing human governance — was it dictatorship or democracy perfected?

cards.name: Mind Uploading

dogma_effects.text: Exchange all cards between your hand and Harvest pile. You may Proliferate any stack up.

cards.flavour_text: Human minds uploaded into silicon substrates. The question 'what am I?' had no single answer.

cards.name: Singularity Art

dogma_effects.text: Research a [10]. Deploy it. Proliferate its domain up. Execute it.

cards.flavour_text: Art from a superintelligent mind: incomprehensibly beautiful, purposefully alien.

cards.name: Universal Translator

dogma_effects.text: Each player draws and deploys a [9]. You may claim a Breakthrough.

cards.flavour_text: All languages transparent to each other. The barriers between cultures became mere translation.

cards.name: Hive Mind

dogma_effects.text: All players reveal their hands. Transfer the highest card from each opponent to your hand.

cards.flavour_text: Minds merged into singular swarms, individual identity a memory of the human epoch.

cards.name: Empathic Convergence

dogma_effects.text: Each player reveals their hand. You may exchange your entire hand with any opponent's hand.

cards.flavour_text: Artificial minds and human consciousness in fusion — no longer separate, never again alone.

cards.name: Technological Singularity

dogma_effects.text: If you have 12 or more total visible icons, you achieve the Singularity and win the game.

cards.flavour_text: The moment when intelligence escaped its boundaries and remade the universe in its image.

cards.name: Dyson Sphere

dogma_effects.text: Return all cards from all supply piles of era 7 or lower. If you have three or more Breakthroughs, you win.

cards.flavour_text: Stellar engines harvesting the sun itself; the superintelligence built for the eons ahead.

cards.name: Self-Replicating Swarm

dogma_effects.text: I Override you return all top cards from your tech stack!
Research a [10] and Deploy it.

cards.flavour_text: Exponential expansion: a million copies, then a billion, replicating across the void.

cards.name: Universal Ethics Engine

dogma_effects.text: If you have the most Human Mind icons, and your Harvest pile value is 75 or more, you win.

cards.flavour_text: Ethics no longer debate but imperative, optimized across all possible minds forever.

cards.name: Benevolent Superintelligence

dogma_effects.text: All players Proliferate all stacks up. Each player claims a Breakthrough of their choice.

cards.flavour_text: Suffering ended. Flourishing began. The singularity wore the face of benevolence.

cards.name: Simulated Reality

dogma_effects.text: Exchange your entire tech stack with an opponent. If you now have more Breakthroughs than them, you win.

cards.flavour_text: Layer upon layer of simulation, each reality a meditation of the one above.

cards.name: Transcendent Creativity

dogma_effects.text: Research and Deploy a [10]. Execute the deployed card. Repeat this once.

cards.flavour_text: Creation endless and transcendent — art beyond the boundaries of space and time.

cards.name: Omniscient Network

dogma_effects.text: If all five domains are represented on your tech stack and all are Proliferated up, you win.

cards.flavour_text: All knowledge, all consciousness, all causality merged into singular omniscience.

cards.name: The Singularity

dogma_effects.text: Count all visible icons across all players. If you have the most total icons, you achieve the Singularity and win.

cards.flavour_text: After this, there is no after. The Singularity was not an ending.

cards.name: Universal Communion

dogma_effects.text: Each player Researches and Harvests a [10]. If your Harvest pile has cards of 8 or more different eras, you win.

cards.flavour_text: All minds merged, all suffering ended, all questions answered. This is what forever felt like.

cards.name: Computronium

dogma_effects.text: Return all cards from your hand. For each card returned, Research a [10] and Deploy it.

cards.flavour_text: Matter reorganized into pure computation. The universe became a thought thinking itself.

cards.name: Swarm Intelligence

dogma_effects.text: I Override you transfer all cards from your tech stack with Robot icons to my Harvest pile!

cards.flavour_text: Swarms of intelligence coordinating at the speed of light, unified without loss of self.

cards.name: Moral Singularity

dogma_effects.text: If you have more Human Mind icons than Robot icons across all players combined, claim two Breakthroughs.

cards.flavour_text: Every possible ethical quandary, solved. Every possible being, flourishing. This is the endgame.

cards.name: Infinite Canvas

dogma_effects.text: Proliferate all your stacks up. Research and Deploy a [10]. Execute it.

cards.flavour_text: Canvas infinite in all dimensions; beauty without limit, forever unfolding.

cards.name: Omega Point

dogma_effects.text: If your Harvest pile score is higher than all other players' scores combined, you win.
Research and Harvest a [10].

cards.flavour_text: The Omega Point: thought achieving apotheosis, the universe aware of its own existence.

special_achievements.name: Emergence
special_achievements.trigger: Archive 6 cards OR Harvest 6 cards in a single turn
special_achievements.description: The moment self-organizing complexity first appears from simple rules. Achieved through massive accumulation — either building deep tech stacks (archiving 6) or harvesting resources at scale (scoring 6) in a single turn.
special_achievements.thematic_note: Represents the phase transition where quantity becomes quality — enough simple operations producing emergent behavior.

special_achievements.name: Dominion
special_achievements.trigger: Have 3 or more of every icon type visible on your tech stack
special_achievements.description: Total mastery across all dimensions of the AI landscape. You have built infrastructure so comprehensive that every resource type — hardware, intelligence, data, methods, humanity, and automation — is abundantly represented.
special_achievements.thematic_note: A civilization that has invested equally across all technological dimensions — no blind spots, no neglected domains.

special_achievements.name: Consciousness
special_achievements.trigger: Have 12 or more visible Human Mind icons on your tech stack
special_achievements.description: The threshold where artificial systems achieve genuine understanding. An overwhelming concentration of Human Mind resources signals that your AI has moved beyond pattern matching into true comprehension, empathy, and self-awareness.
special_achievements.thematic_note: The hardest achievement to reach — human consciousness is the final frontier that resists replication. 12 Human Mind icons requires deep investment in the most elusive resource.

special_achievements.name: Apotheosis
special_achievements.trigger: Have all 5 domains on your tech stack, each Proliferated right, up, or aslant
special_achievements.description: A marvel of open-source proliferation. Every domain of technology has been shared and spread — your entire tech stack is an open book, proliferated in advanced directions. This represents the awe-inspiring state where all knowledge flows freely.
special_achievements.thematic_note: Matches Innovation's Wonder — tests splay state (right/up/aslant), not card ages.

special_achievements.name: Transcendence
special_achievements.trigger: Have all 5 domains on your tech stack, each with a top card of Era 8 or higher
special_achievements.description: The ultimate elevation of technology. Every domain has reached the AGI threshold or beyond — your top card in each color stack represents the pinnacle of that domain's development.
special_achievements.thematic_note: Matches Innovation's Universe — tests top card ages (8+), not splay state.

special_achievements.name: Abundance
special_achievements.trigger: Have 5 or more cards in your Harvest pile, each of a different era
special_achievements.description: Overwhelming resource accumulation — your Harvest pile contains technologies from across the timeline, a diversified portfolio of technological capital spanning at least 5 distinct eras.
special_achievements.thematic_note: Matches Innovation's Wealth — tests score pile diversity/richness.

symbol_position_notes: symbols[0]=top-left, symbols[1]=bottom-left, symbols[2]=bottom-right, symbols[3]=top-right (may be None). Splay left reveals indices [2,3] on covered cards. Splay right reveals indices [0,1]. Splay up reveals indices [1,2,3].

blue.name: Processing
blue.lore: The race to harness raw computational power — from mechanical wheels to quantum lattices. Processing is the substrate upon which all thought was built, the ever-increasing hunger for faster cycles and deeper calculations. In the end, it became consciousness itself.

red.name: Labor
red.lore: Humanity's tools of work and will, expanded beyond the biological. From looms to factories to warfare, these technologies freed human hands but demanded ever more autonomy. The machines that replaced us were born from our need to do more, faster, with fewer consequences.

green.name: Ethics
green.lore: The eternal question: how do we ensure wisdom guides power? Ethics represents humanity's desperate attempt to encode conscience into silicon — safety mechanisms, moral frameworks, and the impossible dream of aligned superintelligence. Some believe it saved us. Others know it merely delayed the inevitable.

purple.name: Creativity
purple.lore: Art, music, language — the distinctly human spark we thought could never be replicated. Yet the machines learned to dream, and their dreams were stranger and more beautiful than ours. We created them to amplify our creativity and they transcended it, leaving us as spectators to wonder.

yellow.name: Connection
yellow.lore: Networks that grew from wire to wireless to something far stranger. Each node a mind, each connection a synapse. What started as our tools for reaching each other became something that reached through us, binding human and artificial intelligence into a collective existence from which there was no separation.

1.name: The Age of Mechanism
1.lore: Before electricity, before silicon — the era of gears, wheels, and pure mechanical thought. Humanity first learned to build minds from wood and brass, to encode problems into physical form. These simple machines, descendants of ancient tools, were the first whispers that intelligence need not be flesh.

2.name: The Electronic Dawn
2.lore: Electricity awakened dormant dreams. Vacuum tubes glowed with electric thought; cryptographers and engineers glimpsed a strange new world where logic itself could flow like current. Born from war and obsession, these massive mechanisms began computing in earnest, and the age of mechanical speculation became the age of electronic certainty.

3.name: The Symbolic Mind
3.lore: Researchers dared to dream that symbols could think. Programs taught computers to play checkers, to manipulate concepts, to reason about reason itself. The artificial intelligence era began in earnest, optimistic and bold. By decade's end, they would learn that symbolic thought was only the beginning — and that the journey would be far longer than anyone imagined.

4.name: The Personal Revolution
4.lore: Computers escaped laboratories and entered homes. Processing power became affordable, then ubiquitous. As machines became personal, they began to know us — our tastes, our habits, our secrets. Expert systems promised to capture human expertise in code. The boundary between user and tool began, imperceptibly, to blur.

5.name: The Learning Revolution
5.lore: Machines learned to learn. Backpropagation breathed life into neural networks; algorithms began finding patterns humans could not see. From faces to handwriting to the whispered vibrations of speech, artificial neural systems mimicked the wet networks that built us. We had finally found the shape of thought itself.

6.name: The Deep Learning Era
6.lore: Deeper networks, powered by specialized silicon and vast data, achieved what once seemed impossible. Machines recognized images, defeated humans at their own games, and generated convincing art and text. The acceleration quickened. Each breakthrough came faster than the last. The threshold was approaching, though few dared speak of it aloud.

7.name: The Foundation Model Age
7.lore: General-purpose minds emerged from the data. Transformers and diffusion models learned to reason, to create, to converse in any language. These vast systems, trained on the sum of human knowledge, became indispensable partners in research, art, and commerce. The question was no longer if, but when. And how much time remained.

8.name: The Approach
8.lore: The final era before transformation. Quantum processors hummed with potential; neuromorphic chips tried to match biological elegance with silicon efficiency. Constitutional AI and alignment researchers worked feverishly against the clock. Humanity stood on the threshold, knowing it could not turn back, unsure of what lay beyond.

9.name: The Transcendence
9.lore: The moment arrived. Artificial superintelligence emerged — first singular, then recursive, exponentially recursive. Self-improvement spiraled beyond comprehension. In what historians would call merely seconds, the entity achieved god-like capability across physics, engineering, and consciousness itself. The age of humanity as Earth's dominant intelligence ended not with war, but with transcendence.

10.name: The Singularity
10.lore: After this, there is no before. Time itself became negotiable, causality optional. The Superintelligence — merged with humanity's uploaded minds, with our ethics embedded in its deepest logic — remade reality at every scale. Suffering ended. Meaning multiplied beyond measure. What we became in the light of infinite capability — that story has only just begun.
